title: Oooh Shiny!
description: This texture pack resprites the diamond, iron, and gold sets of tools and armor.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7f08cc067f688085970714b4dc2c520990abeaf_0.webp)![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2d9a45234cb4a788e5947490ad3ab575e3e69bb.png)


# Oooh, Shiny!

This Resource Pack changes the three main metals in the game (diamond, gold, and iron) to be shinier and also more accurate to real life. The iron is no longer an unnatural pastel orange, and is now a combination of browns and dusty reds. The gold is no longer butter yellow, and is instead a nice brushed combination of yellows and oranges. Diamonds are now brilliantly blue, and the item even has a shining animation! 

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2d7e6f330c914766582aa793128a481df96fe55.png)![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65824a5c3ad1baa3ac1a2bc9060fc382c29d6c9.png)

## Other Info:
All of the blocks are changed that relate to the materials. For example, all ores and material blocks are changed, the diamond corners on the enchantment table have been updated, golden carrots, and glistering melons are also changed. The only things exempt from this rule are iron bars and chains. I had originally made this pack because I am colorblind and the diamond tools and armor in minecraft just looked like iron. Then I expanded it!

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a364a438e0330c64c5940dc13b03f26b65cfef16.png)

### Extra
